description: Style NoteThis stylish watch from titan, with classic, timeless styling is a must have for every well dressed man. Built with the utmost precision and individuality, each watch has been designed and carefully tested to give you years of reliable service and contemporary style for the man of class!Product DetailsSilver coloured steel case with a fixed bezel for durability, style and comfortSilver steel strap with a butterfly claspSilver dial with silver hands Titan logo at the 12 hour markDate aperture at the 6 hour markScrew to reset timeSolid case back for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering or in light rainSizeCase diameter: 25.4 mmDial shape: RectangleWarranty: 2 Years
